_comment: Screenshot manifest. Status: placeholder | draft | stale | approved. See docs/screenshot-automation.md.

homepageHero.alt: Marker scorecard showing an active golf round
homepageHero.notes: Expo screenshot. Complete visual, accuracy, and privacy review before marking approved.

homepageLeaderboard.alt: Live leaderboard showing player standings during a golf round
homepageLeaderboard.notes: Expo screenshot. Complete visual, accuracy, and privacy review before marking approved.

homepageGames.alt: Marker showing configured games for a golf event
homepageGames.notes: Expo screenshot. Complete visual, accuracy, and privacy review before marking approved.

homepageEndRound.alt: End-of-round settlement screen showing who owes who
homepageEndRound.notes: Pre-Expo screenshot. Not currently placed on any page. Good candidate for homepage settlement feature row.

homepageEventList.alt: Marker event list showing upcoming and past golf events
homepageEventList.notes: Pre-Expo screenshot. Not currently placed. Good candidate for Create an Event tutorial.

homepageScorecard.alt: Scorecard view in Marker showing hole-by-hole scores
homepageScorecard.notes: Pre-Expo screenshot. Not currently placed. Good candidate for event-scoring tutorial.

homepageScoring.alt: Score entry screen in Marker for entering hole scores
homepageScoring.notes: Pre-Expo screenshot. Not currently placed. Good candidate for event-scoring tutorial.

tutorialCreateEventStep1.alt: Marker event list with the button to create a new golf event
tutorialCreateEventStep1.caption: Tap the + button on the Events tab to start a new event.
tutorialCreateEventStep1.notes: Replace after create-event flow is stable in Expo app. Capture from Events tab with the + CTA visible.

tutorialCreateEventStep2.alt: New event form in Marker showing course search, event name, and date fields
tutorialCreateEventStep2.caption: Search for your course, name the event, and set the date.
tutorialCreateEventStep2.notes: Replace after event form is stable. Show course search field with a result selected.

tutorialAddGamesStep1.alt: Marker game picker showing all available game formats
tutorialAddGamesStep1.caption: Tap + in the Games section to open the game picker.
tutorialAddGamesStep1.notes: Replace after GamePicker screen is stable. Show full list of formats including Premium pills.

tutorialAddGamesStep2.alt: Game configuration form in Marker showing handicap and player settings
tutorialAddGamesStep2.caption: Configure handicap, select players, and set any game-specific options.
tutorialAddGamesStep2.notes: Replace after GameForm screen is stable. Show Skins or Nassau configuration as example.

tutorialEventScoringStep1.alt: Scorecard view in Marker during an active golf round
tutorialEventScoringStep1.caption: The scorecard updates as each player enters their score.
tutorialEventScoringStep1.notes: Replace after scoring screen is stable. Show an active round with a few holes entered.

tutorialHandicapSettings.alt: Handicap settings panel in Marker showing Net/Gross toggle and allowance options
tutorialHandicapSettings.caption: Configure handicap allowance, stroke limits, and half-stroke rules per game.
tutorialHandicapSettings.notes: Replace after handicap settings panel is stable. Show expanded advanced settings.

gameWolfSetup.alt: Wolf game setup screen in Marker showing the lone wolf assignment for a hole
gameWolfSetup.caption: The wolf chooses their partner (or goes alone) before anyone else tees off.
gameWolfSetup.notes: Replace after Wolf game screen is stable. Show hole view with wolf selection prompt.

gameNassauSetup.alt: Nassau game configuration in Marker showing match amounts for front, back, and full 18
gameNassauSetup.caption: Set separate match amounts for front 9, back 9, and the full 18.
gameNassauSetup.notes: Replace after Nassau configuration is stable. Show the three-bet setup form.

gameSkinsPayout.alt: Skins payout screen in Marker showing hole-by-hole skin winners and carry amounts
gameSkinsPayout.caption: Skins accumulate when a hole is halved — Marker tracks every carry automatically.
gameSkinsPayout.notes: Replace after Skins results screen is stable. Show a game with several carries.

commissionersHero.alt: Marker event overview showing four scorecard groups with tee times, multiple game formats including Skins and Team Stroke Play, and centralized commissioner controls for managing a tournament
commissionersHero.notes: 4 four-player groups with tee times, Skins + Stroke Play + Team Stroke Play + Team Stableford configured, centralized event controls visible. Verify all names are fictional before approving.

commissionersLiveScoring.alt: Live event leaderboard in Marker showing multiple teams in a Team Stroke Play event with front and back scoring, total standings, and accounting values during a round in progress
commissionersLiveScoring.notes: Event-wide Team Stroke Play leaderboard. Multiple four-player teams, round in progress, front/back splits, accounting values visible. Verify all names are fictional before approving.

commissionersSettlement.alt: Event settlement screen in Marker showing buy-ins collected, payouts distributed from the pot to winners, profit and loss per player, and calculated payment amounts
commissionersSettlement.notes: Post-round settlement showing pot-based payouts, settlement and P&L views, share leaderboard action. Verify all player names are fictional before approving.
